global_prompt_constraints.projection: orthographic top-down icon view, slight 3/4 perspective angle for depth
global_prompt_constraints.render_style: hand-drawn watercolor, soft organic brushwork, warm pastel palette
global_prompt_constraints.outline: primary subject color darkened 32%, 2px outline, no pure black
global_prompt_constraints.paper_texture: subtle paper grain overlay at 6% opacity inside draw area
global_prompt_constraints.consistent_lighting: soft top-left ambient light, no harsh directional shadows
global_prompt_constraints.style_reference: Animal Crossing New Horizons icon art × Wytchwood watercolor texture

s0_before_repair.saturation_adjustment: reduce saturation to 8-15%, reduce brightness to 42-48%
s0_before_repair.description: 褪色枯岛 — aged, faded, desaturated island before restoration begins
s0_before_repair.filter_note: Apply desaturation post-generation: hsl saturation 8-15%, brightness 42-48%

s1.description: 轮廓找回淡彩 — faint color returning, outlines becoming visible

s2.description: 生活气息色彩 — lively colors, island showing signs of recovery

s3.description: 角色回归满生命力 — near-full color as characters return

s4_full.description: 完整水彩光效全开 — full vibrant watercolor with light effects active

tile_generation_specs.name: 金枪鱼
tile_generation_specs.base_prompt: Hand-drawn watercolor style game icon of a golden bluefin tuna fish, cute chibi proportions, rounded body, side-profile with slight upward tilt, warm golden-yellow scales with teal accent fins, soft organic brushwork, transparent background, 128×128px with 8px bleed, no text, no labels, readable at 32px
tile_generation_specs.negative_prompt: pixel art, realistic photo, 3D render, neon colors, sharp geometric shapes, pure black outlines, text, UI elements, decorations outside tile boundary

chapter_color_mods.ch1: primary teal #5BBFB5 tint on environment elements, base saturation 8-15%
chapter_color_mods.ch6: night indigo #1E2E50 cool tint with golden hour accent, saturation 75-88%

repair_plan.repair_strategy: Adjust prompt specificity — add more concrete size/shape descriptors; increase bleed specification; add 'centered subject, full body visible within frame'; switch to fallback API (openrouter-gpt-image) on third attempt
